segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Welcome to the Chess and in Mr. B.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: So where are you joining us from?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: The Big Apple.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: I'm sorry he's a little bit wound up.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: We had to stop at every maple candy stand on the way here.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: I ate all my gifts for everybody.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I'm sorry, Mr. B.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: There's no record of your reservation in the computer.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: Well, that's impossible.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: Can you check again, please?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: You can check again, please.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I'm sorry, it's not here.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: Let me get this straight.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: I called yesterday to try to cancel my reservation,

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: and was told it's not refundable.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: Then we drove six hours all the way up here,

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: and now you're telling me that we don't have a reservation?

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: I don't know what to say.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: She doesn't know what to say.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_02
segments.text: Just give us the cheapest room you have.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: Unfortunately, the only thing we have available

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_01
segments.text: is our deluxe suite, the rate of $600.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: That's insane.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: It was totally insane.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Dude, let's drive home.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: We'll hit all the maple candy stores on the way back.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: And if they're closed, then maybe we'll tap a tree

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: and make some of ourselves.

segments.speaker: SPEAKER_00
segments.text: Does that room have a closet I can lock him in?
